title: salix divergens
intro: Salix divergens, also known as River Willow or Divergent Willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Salix divergens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Salix divergens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or salve, and its bark and leaves have been used in various herbal preparations for their medicinal and therapeutic properties.
